obligation.goal:
forall (p : frm (augmented_language L Henkin_constants))
  (_ : gt hc (maxs (accum_HCs_frm p))),
eq (HC_occurs_in_frm hc p) false

proofs: intros p Hgt. case_eq (HC_occurs_in_frm hc p); intro H.
intros p H. induction p; simpl.

hypotheses:
ts : trms (augmented_language L Henkin_constants)
  (relation_arity_table (augmented_language L Henkin_constants) R)

goals.goal: eq (orb (HC_occurs_in_trm hc t1) (HC_occurs_in_trm hc t2)) false

hypotheses:
IHp : forall _ : gt hc (maxs (accum_HCs_frm p)),
eq (HC_occurs_in_frm hc p) false

IHp2 : forall _ : gt hc (maxs (accum_HCs_frm p2)),
eq (HC_occurs_in_frm hc p2) false

IHp1 : forall _ : gt hc (maxs (accum_HCs_frm p1)),
eq (HC_occurs_in_frm hc p1) false
goals.goal: eq (orb (HC_occurs_in_frm hc p1) (HC_occurs_in_frm hc p2)) false

hypotheses:
IHp : forall _ : gt hc (maxs (accum_HCs_frm p)),
eq (HC_occurs_in_frm hc p) false

attempts:
induction l as [|a l IH]; intros Hgt HIn; simpl in *.
- contradiction.
- destruct HIn as [HIn|HIn].
-- subst; apply (Nat.lt_irrefl a); eapply Nat.lt_le_trans; eauto; apply Nat.le_max_l.
-- apply IH; auto; eapply Nat.lt_le_trans; eauto; apply Nat.le_max_r. intros p Hgt. destruct (HC_occurs_in_frm hc p) eqn:Hocc.
- exfalso. apply (proj1 (HC_occurs_in_frm_iff_in_accumHCs_frm p hc)) in Hocc. exact (not_in_if_gt_maxs (accum_HCs_frm p) hc Hgt Hocc).
- reflexivity.

intros p H. assert (le_max_l : forall a b, a <= Init.Nat.max a b) by
  (induction a; destruct b; simpl; auto). assert (le_max_r : forall a b, b <= Init.Nat.max a b) by
  (induction a; destruct b; simpl; auto). assert (maxs_ge : forall n l, In n l -> n <= maxs l) by
  (induction l; intros HIn; simpl; destruct HIn as [H'|H'];
   [subst; apply le_max_l | apply IHl in H'; apply le_trans with (maxs l); [exact H' | apply le_max_r]]). assert (Hnotin : ~ In hc (accum_HCs_frm p)) by
  (intro HIn; apply H; apply maxs_ge in HIn; exact HIn). destruct (HC_occurs_in_frm hc p) eqn:E;
[exfalso; apply Hnotin; apply (HC_occurs_in_frm_iff_in_accumHCs_frm p hc); auto | reflexivity].

intros p H. assert (not_in_gt_maxs : forall l : list nat, gt hc (maxs l) -> ~ In hc l) by
  (induction l; simpl; intros Hgt Hin; auto; destruct Hin as [->|Hin];
   [ pose proof (Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.le_max_l a (maxs l)) Hgt) as Hlt;
     subst; exact (Nat.lt_irrefl a Hlt)
   | apply IHl; [apply (Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.le_max_r a (maxs l)) Hgt) | exact Hin] ]). assert (frm_implies_in : forall p, HC_occurs_in_frm hc p = true -> In hc (accum_HCs_frm p)) by
  exact (fix rec_frm p (Hp : HC_occurs_in_frm hc p = true) : In hc (accum_HCs_frm p) :=
    match p return HC_occurs_in_frm hc p = true -> In hc (accum_HCs_frm p) with
    | Rel_frm R ts => fun Hp' => rec_trms ts Hp'
    | Eqn_frm t1 t2 => fun Hp' =>
      let Horb := Hp' in
      match orb_true_iff _ _ Horb with
      | or_introl Ht1 => rewrite in_app_iff; left; apply rec_trm t1 Ht1
      | or_intror Ht2 => rewrite in_app_iff; right; apply rec_trm t2 Ht2
      end
    | Imp_frm p1 p2 => fun Hp' =>
      let Horb := Hp' in
      match orb_true_iff _ _ Horb with
      | or_introl Hp1 => rewrite in_app_iff; left; apply rec_frm p1 Hp1
      | or_intror Hp2 => rewrite in_app_iff; right; apply rec_frm p2 Hp2
      end
    | Neg_frm p1 => fun Hp' => rec_frm p1 Hp'
    | All_frm x p1 => fun Hp' => rec_frm p1 Hp'
    end Hp
  with rec_trm t (Ht : HC_occurs_in_trm hc t = true) : In hc (accum_HCs_trm t) :=
    match t return HC_occurs_in_trm hc t = true -> In hc (accum_HCs_trm t) with
    | Var x => fun Ht' => discriminate Ht'
    | BVar n => fun Ht' => discriminate Ht'
    | Const c => fun Ht' =>
      match c with
      | inl _ => discriminate Ht'
      | inr hc' => 
        simpl in Ht';
        destruct (Nat.eq_dec hc hc') as [E|E];
        [ subst; simpl; auto | discriminate Ht' ]
      end
    | Func f args => fun Ht' => rec_trms args Ht'
    end Ht
  with rec_trms ts (Hts : HC_occurs_in_trms hc ts = true) : In hc (accum_HCs_trms ts) :=
    match ts return HC_occurs_in_trms hc ts = true -> In hc (accum_HCs_trms ts) with
    | nil_trms => fun Hts' => discriminate Hts'
    | cons_trms t ts' => fun Hts' =>
      let Horb := Hts' in
      match orb_true_iff _ _ Horb with
      | or_introl Ht => rewrite in_app_iff; left; apply rec_trm t Ht
      | or_intror Hts'' => rewrite in_app_iff; right; apply rec_trms ts' Hts''
      end
    end Hts
  for rec_frm). apply not_true_iff_false; intro Htrue; apply (not_in_gt_maxs (accum_HCs_frm p) H); apply (frm_implies_in p Htrue).

intros p H. assert (maxs_app_ge1 : forall l1 l2, maxs l1 <= maxs (l1 ++ l2)) by (induction l1; simpl; auto; apply Nat.max_le_compat_r; auto). assert (maxs_app_ge2 : forall l1 l2, maxs l2 <= maxs (l1 ++ l2)) by (induction l1; simpl; auto; eapply le_trans; [apply IHl1 | apply Nat.le_max_r]). induction p; simpl.
- apply HC_occurs_in_trms_false; exact H.
- apply orb_false_iff; split; [apply HC_occurs_in_trm_false; apply (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le H (maxs_app_ge1 _ _)) | apply HC_occurs_in_trm_false; apply (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le H (maxs_app_ge2 _ _))].
- apply orb_false_iff; split; [apply IHp1; apply (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le H (maxs_app_ge1 _ _)) | apply IHp2; apply (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le H (maxs_app_ge2 _ _))].
- apply IHp; exact H.
- apply IHp; exact H.

intros p Hgt. case_eq (HC_occurs_in_frm hc p); intro H.
- exfalso. apply (proj1 (HC_occurs_in_frm_iff_in_accumHCs_frm p hc) H) in H. assert (Hnotin : forall (l : list nat) (x : nat), x > maxs l -> ~ In x l)
    by (induction l as [|a l IH]; simpl; intros x Hmax HIn; destruct HIn as [Hx|HIn];
        [subst a; exact (Nat.lt_irrefl x (Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.le_max_l x (maxs l)) Hmax))
        | apply (IH x (Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.le_max_r a (maxs l)) Hmax) HIn)]). apply (Hnotin (accum_HCs_frm p) hc Hgt H).
- exact H.

intros p Hgt. destruct (HC_occurs_in_frm hc p) eqn:Hv; [| reflexivity]. exfalso; apply (proj1 (HC_occurs_in_frm_iff_in_accumHCs_frm p hc) Hv) in Hv. induction (accum_HCs_frm p) as [|a l IH] in Hv, Hgt |- *.
- inversion Hv.
- simpl in Hgt; destruct Hv as [-> | Hv'].
-- apply (Nat.lt_irrefl a (Nat.le_lt_trans (Nat.le_max_l a (maxs l)) Hgt)).
-- apply (IH Hv' (Nat.le_lt_trans (Nat.le_max_r a (maxs l)) Hgt)).

intros p H. induction p; simpl.
- exact (HC_occurs_in_trms_false hc ts H).
- apply orb_false_iff; split; [ apply HC_occurs_in_trm_false; eapply Nat.lt_le_trans; [exact H | apply maxs_app_l] | apply HC_occurs_in_trm_false; eapply Nat.lt_le_trans; [exact H | apply maxs_app_r] ].
- apply orb_false_iff; split; [ apply IHp1; eapply Nat.lt_le_trans; [exact H | apply maxs_app_l] | apply IHp2; eapply Nat.lt_le_trans; [exact H | apply maxs_app_r] ].
- apply IHp; exact H.
- apply IHp; exact H.

induction ts; simpl; intros H; auto. apply orb_false_iff; split; [apply HC_occurs_in_trm_false_if_gt_maxs; eapply Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le; [exact H|]; apply maxs_app_l | apply IHts; eapply Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le; [exact H|]; apply maxs_app_r]. induction p; intro H; simpl in *.
- apply HC_occurs_in_trms_false_if_gt_maxs; exact H.
- apply orb_false_iff; split; apply HC_occurs_in_trm_false_if_gt_maxs; eauto using maxs_app_l, maxs_app_r.
- apply orb_false_iff; split; [apply IHp1 | apply IHp2]; eauto using maxs_app_l, maxs_app_r.
- all: apply IHp; exact H.

nodes.proof:
simpl accum_HCs_frm in H. assert (maxs_app : forall l1 l2 : list nat, maxs (l1 ++ l2) = max (maxs l1) (maxs l2)).
{ induction l1 as [|x xs IH]; intros l2; simpl.
-- sfirstorder.
-- rewrite IH; rewrite Nat.max_assoc; reflexivity. }
rewrite maxs_app in H. fcrush.
attempts:
simpl in H. assert (maxs_app : forall l1 l2, maxs (l1 ++ l2) = Nat.max (maxs l1) (maxs l2)) by
  (induction l1; intros; simpl; [reflexivity | rewrite IHl1; rewrite <- Nat.max_assoc; reflexivity]). rewrite maxs_app in H. fcrush.

simpl in H. assert (Hmax_eq : maxs (app (accum_HCs_frm p1) (accum_HCs_frm p2)) = max (maxs (accum_HCs_frm p1)) (maxs (accum_HCs_frm p2))) by (induction (accum_HCs_frm p1) as [| a l1' IH]; simpl; [rewrite Nat.max_0_r | rewrite IH; rewrite Nat.max_assoc]; reflexivity). apply orb_false_iff; split; [apply IHp1; apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt with (max (maxs (accum_HCs_frm p1)) (maxs (accum_HCs_frm p2))); [apply Nat.le_max_l | rewrite <- Hmax_eq in H; exact H] | apply IHp2; apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt with (max (maxs (accum_HCs_frm p1)) (maxs (accum_HCs_frm p2))); [apply Nat.le_max_r | rewrite <- Hmax_eq in H; exact H] ].

simpl accum_HCs_frm in H. assert (maxs_app : forall l1 l2 : list nat, maxs (l1 ++ l2) = max (maxs l1) (maxs l2)).
{ induction l1 as [|x xs IH]; intros l2; simpl.
-- sfirstorder.
-- rewrite IH; rewrite Nat.max_assoc; reflexivity. }
rewrite maxs_app in H. fcrush.
failed_attempts: simpl in H. assert (Hmax_eq : maxs (app (accum_HCs_frm p1) (accum_HCs_frm p2)) = max (maxs (accum_HCs_frm p1)) (maxs (accum_HCs_frm p2))) by (induction (accum_HCs_frm p1) as [| a l1' IH]; simpl; [rewrite Nat.max_0_r | rewrite IH; rewrite Nat.max_assoc]; reflexivity). apply orb_false_iff; split; [apply IHp1; apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt with (max (maxs (accum_HCs_frm p1)) (maxs (accum_HCs_frm p2))); [apply Nat.le_max_l | rewrite <- Hmax_eq in H; exact H] | apply IHp2; apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt with (max (maxs (accum_HCs_frm p1)) (maxs (accum_HCs_frm p2))); [apply Nat.le_max_r | rewrite <- Hmax_eq in H; exact H] ].

hypotheses:
IHp : forall _ : gt hc (maxs (accum_HCs_frm p)),
eq (HC_occurs_in_frm hc p) false

proofs: intros p H. induction p; simpl.

ts : trms (augmented_language L Henkin_constants)

goals.goal: eq (orb (HC_occurs_in_trm hc t1) (HC_occurs_in_trm hc t2)) false
